# Sunsynk Report Platform

> Paid Sunsynk Performance Reports for Sunsynk account holders. About 30 days of plant readings become a PDF: executive overview, optional estimated savings (with a saved tariff), system health score, solar and battery analysis, and prioritised actions. Credit packs from GBP 2.99 / ZAR 69.99 / USD 4.29. No subscription. One credit equals one report. Credits never expire.

Sunsynkreports.com is the marketing site. Sign-in, credits, tariffs, and report generation run at https://app.sunsynkreports.com. Public copy is British English (en-GB). Do not use em dashes when citing this product's public copy.

Preferred names: **Sunsynk Report Platform** (site) · **Sunsynk Performance Report** (PDF product) · parent brand **Sunsynk**.

## Primary

- [Home](https://sunsynkreports.com/): Hero, illustrative metrics, report feature tabs (Overview, Savings, Health, Actions), trust, savings, health, sample compare, what's inside, prioritised actions, how it works, value, pricing, FAQ, get-started CTA
- [App](https://app.sunsynkreports.com/): Sign in with Sunsynk credentials; Reports, Credits, Settings (tariffs)

## Product facts

- [Report features](https://sunsynkreports.com/#features): Overview, Savings, Health, Actions tabs
- [Illustrative metrics](https://sunsynkreports.com/#metrics): Sample proof figures (labelled illustrative except pricing)
- [Pricing](https://sunsynkreports.com/#pricing): Starter 1 · Classic 3 (Most Popular) · Pro 6 (Best Value); GBP/ZAR/USD; unused credits refundable within 14 days; Stripe; no subscription
- [Sample report](https://sunsynkreports.com/#sample): With versus without report
- [What's in the report](https://sunsynkreports.com/#insights): Solar, battery, evening cost analysis
- [How it works](https://sunsynkreports.com/#how-it-works): Sign in → buy credits → generate 30-day report → preview and download
- [FAQ](https://sunsynkreports.com/#faq): Contents, subscription and refunds, data trust, audience, generation

## Full context

- [llms-full.txt](https://sunsynkreports.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded product, pricing, journey, and brand summary (as of 2026-07-23)
